title: Sustainable Aviation Fuel Revenue Certainty Mechanism: Approach to Industry Funding
content: This government is committed to delivering greener transport and securing the aviation industryâ€™s long-term future. Decarbonising aviation will play an important role in the growth of the sector with opportunities created for new industries and more jobs. The UK sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) industry will play a vital role in supporting both the decarbonisation and growth of the sector.
author: Analysts Account
